Place the Steamworks SDK here.

1. Download from https://partner.steamgames.com/
2. Extract so the structure is:
   vendor/steamworks/sdk/public/steam/steam_api_flat.h
   vendor/steamworks/sdk/redistributable_bin/osx/libsteam_api.dylib
   vendor/steamworks/sdk/redistributable_bin/linux64/libsteam_api.so
   vendor/steamworks/sdk/redistributable_bin/win64/steam_api64.dll
